name: filesystem-read
description: Filesystem read plugin for grep/glob planning and command observation

performance.name: filesystem-read-correctness
performance.description: Use grep/glob only when relevant and capture results accurately

environment.name: workspace-filesystem
environment.description: Workspace-local filesystem readable through guarded shell commands

actuators.name: filesystem_grep
actuators.description: Run regex content searches on allowed workspace paths

actuators.name: filesystem_glob
actuators.description: List files by glob pattern on allowed workspace paths

actuators.name: filesystem_read
actuators.description: Read text file contents on allowed workspace paths

sensors.name: filesystem_command_output
sensors.description: Observe command stdout for filesystem read actions

sensors.name: filesystem_command_error
sensors.description: Observe command stderr and permission denials

sensors.name: filesystem_command_complete
sensors.description: Observe command completion status and metadata
